response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 15+ years of development experience and genuine developer-tooling depth (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, Selenium training, MCP code generators), which fits the engineering-productivity focus well. However, the role is a Level II people-management position requiring at least 2 years of people management and 3 years of technical leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of formal people management, performance reviews, roadmap ownership, or organizational change leadership. Mobile experience exists but is limited to a single iOS/Apple TV stint. The IC-to-manager gap is too large for this specific role.
strengths: Deep developer-tools background: authored test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), built CI/CD and device-orchestration infrastructure, and taught testing courses
15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Demonstrated knowledge sharing and community leadership via workshops, conference talks, and an open-source founder role
concerns: No formal people-management experience — no direct reports, 1:1s, or performance management evident anywhere in the resume
No demonstrated organizational-change or strategic roadmap leadership at team/org level
Mobile-platform experience is limited and dated (one iOS/Apple TV role in 2015-2016)

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure expertise
Limited technical leadership at organizational scope
